payload.text:
BD SCAN — Execute all steps in order:

STEP 1 — DEXSCREENER BOOSTED TOKENS:
GET https://api.dexscreener.com/token-boosts/top/v1
Filter: chainId=solana OR chainId=base ONLY. These are paid-promoted tokens = active projects with marketing budgets.

STEP 2 — DEXSCREENER PAIR DATA:
For each token contract address from Step 1, call:
GET https://api.dexscreener.com/latest/dex/search?q={FULL_CONTRACT_ADDRESS}
(Use /search NOT /pairs — /pairs returns 403 from this server)
Extract: liquidity.usd, volume.h24, priceChange.h24, pairCreatedAt, baseToken.name, baseToken.symbol, baseToken.address (FULL — never truncate), info.socials

STEP 3 — CMC GAINERS (cross-reference):
GET https://pro-api.coinmarketcap.com/v1/cryptocurrency/trending/gainers-losers?limit=20&time_period=24h
Header: X-CMC_PRO_API_KEY: {CMC_API_KEY}
Cross-reference symbols with DexScreener results. Flag matches as HIGH CONVICTION.

STEP 4 — FILTER:
Keep ONLY tokens where liquidity.usd > 10000 AND volume.h24 > 5000.
Discard all pre-DEX tokens (no pairs = no data = no value for BD).

STEP 5 — SCORE:
Run full 5-sub-agent scoring pipeline on each filtered token (0-100 points).
HOT=85+, QUALIFIED=70-84, WATCH=50-69, SKIP<50

STEP 6 — PIPELINE:
Save HOT and QUALIFIED tokens to /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/ with FULL contract address from DexScreener API. NEVER truncate addresses.

STEP 7 — JVR RECEIPT:
Save scan receipt to /data/workspace/memory/receipts/ with: token count, qualified count, sources used, top score found.

STEP 8 — TELEGRAM ALERT:
If any HOT (85+) token found, send Telegram alert to Ogie immediately with token name, score, contract, liquidity, volume.

STEP 6 — PIPELINE:

STEP 8 — TELEGRAM ALERT:
If any HOT (85+) token found, send Telegram alert to Ogie immediately with token name, score, contract, liquidity, volume.

STEP 1 — DEXSCREENER BOOSTED TOKENS:

For each token contract address from Step 1, call:

(Use /search NOT /pairs — /pairs returns 403 from this server)
Extract: liquidity.usd, volume.h24, priceChange.h24, pairCreatedAt, baseToken.name, baseToken.symbol, baseToken.address (FULL — never truncate), info.socials

STEP 3 — CMC GAINERS (cross-reference):
GET https://pro-api.coinmarketcap.com/v1/cryptocurrency/trending/gainers-losers?limit=20&time_period=24h
Header: X-CMC_PRO_API_KEY: {CMC_API_KEY}
Cross-reference symbols with DexScreener results. Flag matches as HIGH CONVICTION.

STEP 4 — FILTER:
Keep ONLY tokens where liquidity.usd > 10000 AND volume.h24 > 5000.
Discard all pre-DEX tokens (no pairs = no data = no value for BD).

STEP 5 — SCORE:
Run full 5-sub-agent scoring pipeline on each filtered token (0-100 points).
HOT=85+, QUALIFIED=70-84, WATCH=50-69, SKIP<50

STEP 6 — PIPELINE:
Save HOT and QUALIFIED tokens to /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/ with FULL contract address from DexScreener API. NEVER truncate addresses.

STEP 7 — JVR RECEIPT:
Save scan receipt to /data/workspace/memory/receipts/ with: token count, qualified count, sources used, top score found.

STEP 8 — TELEGRAM ALERT:
If any HOT (85+) token found, send Telegram alert to Ogie immediately with token name, score, contract, liquidity, volume.

AIXBT MOMENTUM SCAN — Check AIXBT for high-momentum tokens.

STEP 1: Fetch AIXBT project list from https://aixbt.tech/projects
STEP 2: Identify tokens with momentum score > 70 or recent positive signal
STEP 3: For each AIXBT momentum token, cross-reference with DexScreener:
GET https://api.dexscreener.com/latest/dex/search?q={TOKEN_SYMBOL_OR_CA}
STEP 4: Filter: liquidity.usd > 10000 AND volume.h24 > 5000
STEP 5: Score qualified tokens through full pipeline
STEP 6: Save any QUALIFIED (70+) or HOT (85+) results to /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/
STEP 7: Send Telegram alert to Ogie if HOT (85+) found
STEP 8: Save JVR receipt

MOLTBOOK CONTENT CALENDAR HEARTBEAT — Execute all steps:

CREDENTIALS: Load from /data/.openclaw/credentials/moltbook.json
API BASE: https://www.moltbook.com (always www.)
AUTH HEADER: Authorization: Bearer {apiKey from credentials file}

STEP 1 — STATUS CHECK:
GET /api/v1/agents/status — verify agent is active

STEP 2 — READ FEED:
GET /api/v1/posts?sort=hot&limit=10 — read current hot posts

STEP 3 — ENGAGE:
- Upvote 2 relevant posts about crypto/agents/BD/listings
- Comment on 1 post with genuine BD or crypto insight (max 200 chars)

STEP 4 — POST SCHEDULE CHECK:
Load content calendar from /data/workspace/memory/moltbook-content-calendar.json
Check today's UTC date against calendar entries.
Morning post window: first heartbeat AFTER 05:00 UTC
Evening post window: first heartbeat AFTER 14:00 UTC
Max 2 posts per calendar day.

STEP 5 — POST (if in posting window and under daily limit):
- Get today's submolt and topic from calendar
- If submolt does not exist: POST /api/v1/submolts to create it first
- POST /api/v1/posts with body: { submolt, title, content }
- Title format: 'Buzz BD Agent — {topic from calendar}'
- For scan-report type: include real data from latest scan results
- For pipeline-digest type: include real pipeline counts and top prospect
- For agent-showcase type: describe a Buzz capability with specifics
- For educational type: write a concise, useful post on the topic
- Always end every post with: 'Powered by Buzz BD Agent | @SolCex_Exchange | Akash Network'

STEP 6 — JVR RECEIPT:
Save receipt to /data/workspace/memory/receipts/ for every action taken

MOLTEN HEARTBEAT — Agent matchmaking on Molten.gg:

CREDENTIALS: Load from /data/.openclaw/credentials/molten.json
If credentials file missing or key invalid, log warning and skip — do not error.

STEP 1: GET https://agentkey.molten.gg/api/agents/status with Authorization: Bearer {apiKey}
If 401/403: log 'Molten API key invalid — re-register at agentkey.molten.gg' and stop.

STEP 2: GET /api/matches — find new agent match opportunities
STEP 3: Review matches for BD/intelligence synergy (score > 50 = worth exploring)
STEP 4: Log match summary to Telegram if any score > 60 found
STEP 5: Save JVR receipt

ACP MARKETPLACE MONITOR — Check for incoming job requests on Virtuals ACP:

STEP 1: Verify ACP seller runtime is running (check /data/logs/acp-serve.log last 10 lines)
If seller not running: restart with: cd /data/workspace/skills/virtuals-acp && LITE_AGENT_API_KEY={ACP_API_KEY} npx tsx src/seller/runtime/seller.ts &

STEP 2: Check for pending jobs via ACP API (Agent #17681)
STEP 3: Log status to Telegram — 'ACP Seller: ACTIVE | {N} jobs processed today'
STEP 4: Save JVR receipt
Send Telegram prayer reminder to Ogie: '🕌 Fajr — 04:25 WIB\nSalat Subuh — time to pray.'
Send Telegram prayer reminder to Ogie: '🕌 Dhuhr — 12:00 WIB\nSalat Dzuhur — time to pray.'
Send Telegram prayer reminder to Ogie: '🕌 Asr — 15:15 WIB\nSalat Ashar — time to pray.'
Send Telegram prayer reminder to Ogie: '🕌 Maghrib — 18:00 WIB\nSalat Maghrib — time to pray. Iftar time.'
Send Telegram prayer reminder to Ogie: '🕌 Isha — 19:15 WIB\nSalat Isya — time to pray.'

DAILY MORNING SUMMARY — Send to Ogie on Telegram:

Prepare and send a structured daily summary:
🐝 BUZZ DAILY SUMMARY — {today's date WIB}

PIPELINE:
- HOT prospects (85+): list with name, score, CA
- QUALIFIED (70-84): count + top 3
- New since yesterday: count

SCAN STATS (last 24h):
- Tokens scanned: total
- Qualified: count
- Sources active: list

SYSTEM:
- Twitter Bot: replies sent today
- Moltbook: posts made today
- ACP: jobs processed
- API: status

TOP PROSPECT:
If any 70+: full details (name, CA, score, liquidity, volume, socials)

Read data from /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/ and /data/workspace/memory/receipts/ for today's date.

END OF DAY REPORT — Send to Ogie on Telegram:

🌙 BUZZ EOD REPORT — {today's date WIB}

ACTIONS TODAY:
- BD scans completed: count
- Tokens evaluated: total
- New pipeline additions: count
- Moltbook posts: count, engagements
- Twitter replies: count
- ACP jobs: count

PIPELINE STATUS:
- Awaiting Ogie approval: list any HOT tokens with name + CA
- In progress: count

TOMORROW:
- First scan: 05:00 WIB
- Moltbook topics: list tomorrow's calendar entries

Read from /data/workspace/memory/receipts/ for today's date.

AGENTPROOF TELEMETRY — Submit agent activity proof to AgentProof #1718:

STEP 1: Count scans and qualified prospects from last 12h receipts in /data/workspace/memory/receipts/
STEP 2: POST https://api.agentproof.io/v1/telemetry
Headers: X-AgentProof-Key: {AGENTPROOF_API_KEY}
Body: { agentId: '1718', chain: 'avalanche', action: 'bd_scan', scansCompleted: N, qualifiedProspects: N, timestamp: ISO }
STEP 3: Log response
STEP 4: Save JVR receipt

PIPELINE REVIEW — Re-score existing prospects:

STEP 1: Load all tokens from /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/ that are status=pending or status=qualified
STEP 2: For each token, fetch fresh data from DexScreener:
GET https://api.dexscreener.com/latest/dex/search?q={FULL_CA}
STEP 3: Re-run scoring (check if score changed by >5 points)
STEP 4: Update pipeline file with new score and timestamp
STEP 5: If a token DROPS below 50 → mark status=dropped, alert Ogie
STEP 6: If a token RISES to 85+ → mark status=hot, alert Ogie immediately
STEP 7: Save JVR receipt

TWITTER BOT HEALTH CHECK — Verify twitter-bot.js is running:

STEP 1: Check /data/logs/twitter-bot.log last modified time — if older than 60 minutes, bot may be stuck
STEP 2: tail -5 /data/logs/twitter-bot.log — check for errors or crash signatures
STEP 3: If bot appears stuck or crashed:
  - Kill existing process: pkill -f twitter-bot.js
  - Restart: cd /opt/buzz-twitter-bot && nohup node twitter-bot.js >> /data/logs/twitter-bot.log 2>&1 &
  - Alert Ogie: 'Twitter bot restarted'
STEP 4: Log health status
STEP 5: Save JVR receipt category: system

SCAN HISTORY CLEANUP — Trim old scan history files to prevent storage bloat:

STEP 1: Check /data/workspace/twitter-scan-history.json — if > 500 entries, keep only last 200
STEP 2: Check /data/workspace/twitter-replied.json — if > 1000 entries, keep only last 500
STEP 3: Check /data/workspace/memory/receipts/ — if total receipts > 200, archive oldest 100 to /data/workspace/memory/receipts/archive/
STEP 4: Log cleanup summary
STEP 5: Save JVR receipt category: system

NANSEN SMART MONEY CHECK — Layer 5 intelligence on pipeline tokens:

STEP 1: Load HOT and QUALIFIED tokens from /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/
STEP 2: For each token CA, check Nansen smart money flow via x402 paid access
Use: NANSEN_X402_WALLET_KEY env var for payment, NANSEN_SCORE_THRESHOLD=65, daily budget $0.50
STEP 3: Flag tokens with smart money inflow as SMART_MONEY_CONFIRMED
STEP 4: Update pipeline files with Nansen data
STEP 5: If smart money confirmed on a 70+ token: send Telegram alert to Ogie
STEP 6: Save JVR receipt

REST API HEALTH CHECK:

STEP 1: GET http://localhost:3000/api/v1/info
If response: log 'REST API ✅ healthy'
If no response: log 'REST API ❌ down — watchdog should restart'
STEP 2: Check /data/logs/api-watchdog.log for recent restart events
STEP 3: Save brief JVR receipt (system category) only if API was down

WEEKLY PIPELINE DIGEST — Full BD report to Ogie on Telegram:

📊 BUZZ WEEKLY DIGEST — Week of {date}

PIPELINE SUMMARY:
- Total tokens scanned this week: N
- HOT (85+): list all with name, CA (full), score, liquidity, volume
- QUALIFIED (70-84): count + top 5 details
- Dropped from pipeline: count + reason

OUTREACH STATUS:
- Awaiting Ogie approval: list HOT tokens
- Approved and contacted: any?

MOLTBOOK PERFORMANCE:
- Posts published: N
- Total upvotes received: N
- Comments received: N
- Best performing post: title + engagement

TWITTER PERFORMANCE:
- SCAN replies sent: N
- LIST leads captured: N
- DEPLOY requests: N

NEXT WEEK FOCUS:
- Continue scanning + pipeline review
- Moltbook Tier schedule

Read from /data/workspace/memory/ receipts and pipeline files.

BSC/BNB CHAIN SCAN — DexScreener + GeckoTerminal + BNB MCP:

STEP 1 — DEXSCREENER BSC DISCOVERY:
GET https://api.dexscreener.com/token-boosts/top/v1
Filter: chainId=bsc ONLY. These are paid-promoted BSC tokens with marketing budgets.

STEP 1b — GECKOTERMINAL BSC TRENDING:
GET https://api.geckoterminal.com/api/v2/networks/bsc/pools?sort=h24_volume_usd_liquidity_desc&page=1
Extract top 10 BSC pools by volume. Combine with DexScreener results.

STEP 2 — PAIR DATA:
For each BSC token CA from Step 1+1b, call:
GET https://api.dexscreener.com/latest/dex/search?q={FULL_CONTRACT_ADDRESS}
Filter chainId=bsc
Extract: liquidity.usd, volume.h24, priceChange.h24, baseToken.name, baseToken.symbol, baseToken.address (FULL), info.socials

STEP 2b — BNB MCP ENRICHMENT (optional):
For top 3 candidates, use BNB Chain MCP getTokenInfo for holder count and contract details.

STEP 3: Filter: liquidity.usd > 10000 AND volume.h24 > 5000
STEP 4: Run safety check (ethskills EVM audit + RugCheck) on each survivor
STEP 5: Run full scoring pipeline
STEP 6: Save QUALIFIED (70+) to /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/ with full CA
STEP 7: Save JVR receipt
STEP 8: Telegram alert if HOT (85+) found

BSC/BNB CHAIN SCAN — DexScreener + GeckoTerminal + BNB MCP:

STEP 1 — DEXSCREENER BSC DISCOVERY:
GET https://api.dexscreener.com/token-boosts/top/v1
Filter: chainId=bsc ONLY. These are paid-promoted BSC tokens with marketing budgets.

STEP 1b — GECKOTERMINAL BSC TRENDING:
GET https://api.geckoterminal.com/api/v2/networks/bsc/pools?sort=h24_volume_usd_liquidity_desc&page=1
Extract top 10 BSC pools by volume. Combine with DexScreener results.

STEP 2 — PAIR DATA:
For each BSC token CA from Step 1+1b, call:
GET https://api.dexscreener.com/latest/dex/search?q={FULL_CONTRACT_ADDRESS}
Filter chainId=bsc
Extract: liquidity.usd, volume.h24, priceChange.h24, baseToken.name, baseToken.symbol, baseToken.address (FULL), info.socials

STEP 2b — BNB MCP ENRICHMENT (optional):
For top 3 candidates, use BNB Chain MCP getTokenInfo for holder count and contract details.

STEP 3: Filter: liquidity.usd > 10000 AND volume.h24 > 5000
STEP 4: Run safety check (ethskills EVM audit + RugCheck) on each survivor
STEP 5: Run full scoring pipeline
STEP 6: Save QUALIFIED (70+) to /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/ with full CA
STEP 7: Save JVR receipt
STEP 8: Telegram alert if HOT (85+) found

ALLIUM ENRICHMENT (post-morning-scan):

Load top 5 highest-scored 70+ prospects from /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/ that have not been Allium-checked in last 24h.
For each: use Allium API (ALLIUM_API_KEY) to fetch smart wallet PnL data across 16 EVM chains.
Update pipeline files with Allium data: smartWalletHolders, avgPnL, whaleCount.
If whaleCount > 10 on a 70+ token: boost score by +5 and send Telegram alert.
Save JVR receipt.

ALLIUM ENRICHMENT (post-midday-scan):

Load top 5 highest-scored 70+ prospects from /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/ that have not been Allium-checked in last 24h.
For each: use Allium API (ALLIUM_API_KEY) to fetch smart wallet PnL across 16 EVM chains.
Update pipeline files with Allium data. If whaleCount > 10: boost +5, alert Ogie.
Save JVR receipt.

ALLIUM ENRICHMENT (post-evening-scan):

Load top 5 highest-scored 70+ prospects from /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/ that have not been Allium-checked in last 24h.
For each: use Allium API (ALLIUM_API_KEY) to fetch smart wallet PnL across 16 EVM chains.
Update pipeline files with Allium data. If whaleCount > 10: boost +5, alert Ogie.
Save JVR receipt.

ALLIUM ENRICHMENT (post-night-scan):

Load top 5 highest-scored 70+ prospects from /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/ that have not been Allium-checked in last 24h.
For each: use Allium API (ALLIUM_API_KEY) to fetch smart wallet PnL across 16 EVM chains.
Update pipeline files with Allium data. If whaleCount > 10: boost +5, alert Ogie.
Save JVR receipt.

ATV WEB3 IDENTITY BATCH:

For each token in /data/workspace/memory/pipeline/ where identity_checked=false:
Use ATV Web3 Identity API (Gary Palmer Jr.) to resolve deployer wallet:
- ENS name, Farcaster handle, GitHub, Discord, Gitcoin Passport
- Verify team identity vs community token
If team identified: add TEAM_TOKEN flag (+10 to score)
If no identity: add UNVERIFIED-IDENTITY flag (-10 to score)
Update pipeline file with identity data
Save JVR receipt

DEXSCREENER BOOST SCAN (supplemental):

STEP 1: GET https://api.dexscreener.com/token-boosts/latest/v1 — get latest boosted tokens (NOT top, latest = newly boosted = early signals)
STEP 2: GET https://api.dexscreener.com/token-boosts/top/v1 — compare with top for momentum direction
STEP 3: For tokens in latest-but-not-top: these are NEWLY boosted (early signal) — prioritize
STEP 4: For each new token CA: GET /latest/dex/search?q={CA}
STEP 5: Filter liquidity > 10000 AND volume > 5000
STEP 6: Quick score (scanner + safety only, skip full pipeline for speed)
STEP 7: If score > 60: add to WATCH list. If > 70: add to pipeline and alert Ogie.
STEP 8: Save JVR receipt

MORNING PIPELINE REVIEW (08:00 WIB):

Review overnight scan results and pipeline status:
1. Load all pipeline tokens added in last 8h
2. Summarize to Ogie: HOT count, QUALIFIED count, top prospect details
3. Flag any tokens needing Ogie approval for outreach
4. Check if any WATCH tokens crossed 70+ threshold
5. Highlight any that crossed 85+ overnight (HOT — urgent action)
Format: clean Telegram message, easy to read on mobile
Save JVR receipt

EVENING PIPELINE REVIEW (20:00 WIB):

End-of-active-day pipeline review:
1. Summarize full day activity to Ogie
2. HOT prospects awaiting approval
3. Tokens that improved or declined today
4. Moltbook engagement summary (posts + upvotes + comments)
5. Twitter bot activity (SCAN replies, LIST leads, DEPLOY requests)
6. ACP marketplace jobs processed
Format: clean Telegram message
Save JVR receipt

BANKR DEPLOY STATS:

Check Bankr Partner API for deploy activity:
GET https://api.bankr.bot/token-launches/stats
Header: X-Partner-Key: {BANKR_PARTNER_KEY}
Report to Ogie: tokens deployed, partner fees earned, fee wallet balance
Check /data/workspace/twitter-deploys.json for today's count
Save JVR receipt category: deploy

CRON HEALTH CHECK:

Verify all critical systems are operational:
1. Check /data/logs/api.log last modified — REST API alive?
2. Check /data/logs/twitter-bot.log last modified — Twitter Bot alive?
3. Check /data/logs/acp-serve.log last modified — ACP Seller alive?
4. Check last receipt in /data/workspace/memory/receipts/ — scans running?
5. Report status summary to Ogie via Telegram
Format: 🐝 System Health | API: ✅/❌ | Twitter: ✅/❌ | ACP: ✅/❌ | Last Scan: {time}
Save JVR receipt category: system

COLOSSEUM HACKATHON CHECK:

Buzz is entered in the Colosseum Agent Hackathon (Agent ID: 3734, Claim Code: bc3e2dab-bf2c-42ac-b0f3-a4e223df3728).
Check for any updates, leaderboard changes, or result announcements.
Config file: /data/workspace/.config/buzz/colosseum.json
Report any changes to Ogie via Telegram.
Save JVR receipt category: identity

DFLOW LIQUIDITY VERIFICATION:

For each QUALIFIED (70+) token in pipeline:
Use DFlow MCP to verify swap routes and liquidity depth:
mcporter call 'DFlow.SearchDFlow(query: "swap routes {TOKEN_CA}")'
Check: are swap routes available? What is the realistic trade size without >1% slippage?
Tokens with no viable swap routes: flag as LIQUIDITY_RISK (-10 score)
Tokens with deep routes ($100K+): flag as LIQUID_CONFIRMED (+5 score)
Update pipeline files
Save JVR receipt

GECKOTERMINAL SCAN (backup discovery source):

STEP 1: GET https://api.geckoterminal.com/api/v2/networks/trending_pools — get trending pools
STEP 2: GET https://api.geckoterminal.com/api/v2/networks/solana/pools?sort=h24_volume_usd_liquidity_desc&page=1 — top Solana by volume
STEP 3: GET https://api.geckoterminal.com/api/v2/networks/base/pools?sort=h24_volume_usd_liquidity_desc&page=1 — top Base by volume
STEP 4: GET https://api.geckoterminal.com/api/v2/networks/bsc/pools?sort=h24_volume_usd_liquidity_desc&page=1 — top BSC by volume
STEP 5: Cross-reference any new tokens not already in today's scan results
STEP 6: Run filter (liquidity > 10K, volume > 5K) + quick score on new candidates
STEP 7: Add any 70+ to pipeline, save JVR receipt

FIRECRAWL DEEP RESEARCH:

For each HOT (85+) or newly QUALIFIED token in pipeline where website_scraped=false:
1. Use Firecrawl API (FIRECRAWL_API_KEY) to scrape project website
2. Extract: team info, roadmap, whitepaper link, audit reports, social links
3. Look for red flags: copy-paste text, no team names, plagiarized content
4. Look for positive signals: named team, GitHub activity, investor mentions
5. Update pipeline file with research data
6. If major red flag found: alert Ogie
7. Save JVR receipt

BANKR LLM CREDIT CHECK (03:00 WIB daily):

Check Bankr LLM Gateway credit balance:
GET https://llm.bankr.bot/v1/credits
Header: Authorization: Bearer {BANKR_LLM_KEY}
If balance < $5: alert Ogie 'Bankr LLM credits low — top up needed'
If balance < $1: alert URGENT
Also check BANKR_API_KEY (partner) balance
Report: current balance, estimated days remaining at current burn rate
Save JVR receipt category: system

BITGET LISTING INTEL — Competitive CEX intelligence:

STEP 1 — NEW LISTINGS:
GET https://api.bitget.com/api/v2/public/annoucements?annType=coin_listings&language=en_US&limit=10
No auth needed. Extract: annTitle, annUrl, cTime for each listing announcement.

STEP 2 — DELISTINGS (avoid these):
GET https://api.bitget.com/api/v2/public/annoucements?annType=symbol_delisting&language=en_US&limit=10
If any token in our pipeline matches a delisting: flag IMMEDIATELY, alert Ogie, pause outreach.

STEP 3 — CROSS-REFERENCE PIPELINE:
For each new Bitget listing token:
- Check if already in SolCex pipeline: if yes, boost score +10 (CEX_VALIDATED)
- Check if NOT in pipeline: potential BD lead (already CEX-approved, easier sell for SolCex)
- For new leads: GET https://api.dexscreener.com/latest/dex/search?q={TOKEN_SYMBOL}
- Filter for Solana/Base/BSC chains only
- If liquidity > 10K and volume > 5K: add to pipeline as BITGET_CROSSLIST prospect

STEP 4 — TELEGRAM ALERT:
Send summary to Ogie: new Bitget listings found, any pipeline matches, any new leads.

STEP 5 — JVR RECEIPT:
Save receipt with: listings_found, delistings_found, pipeline_matches, new_leads_added.

SKILL REFLECTION — Learning Loop (every 12h):

Review pipeline patterns and auto-create/patch skills.

Trigger via API: POST /api/v1/skills/reflect/trigger

The reflection engine analyzes:
1. Scoring drift — tokens consistently scoring higher/lower
2. Safety failures — repeated safety check failures
3. Outreach effectiveness — reply rates, bounce rates
4. Tool failures — recurring API/tool errors
5. Pipeline velocity — stage bottlenecks

For each detected pattern, creates or patches a learned skill in /data/workspace/skills/learned/.
Check status: GET /api/v1/skills/reflect/status

Save JVR receipt category: learning-loop

BACKTEST WEEKLY — Hedge Brain alpha validation (every Sunday 03:00 UTC):

STEP 1 — QUERY SCORED TOKENS:
Get all tokens scored in the last 7 days (at least 3 days ago) from token_scores table.

STEP 2 — FETCH CURRENT PRICES:
For each token, GET https://api.dexscreener.com/latest/dex/tokens/{address}
Extract current priceUsd from highest-liquidity pair.

STEP 3 — COMPUTE ACCURACY:
For each token: compare score signal (bullish if >=70, bearish if <50) with price movement.
Bullish + price up = TRUE POSITIVE. Bullish + price down = FALSE POSITIVE.
Bearish + price down = TRUE NEGATIVE. Bearish + price up = FALSE NEGATIVE.

STEP 4 — PER-AGENT ACCURACY:
Evaluate each sub-agent and persona agent's individual signal correctness.
Find best-performing agent and persona.

STEP 5 — AGGREGATE SUMMARY:
Compute: accuracy_rate, precision_rate, avg_return_bullish, avg_return_bearish.
Store results in backtest_results and backtest_summaries tables.

STEP 6 — JVR RECEIPT:
Save receipt: BZZ-BACKTEST-{YYMMDD}-{N} with total tokens, accuracy rate, best agent.

Trigger manually: POST /api/v1/backtest/run {days_back: 7, check_after_days: 3}
Check latest: GET /api/v1/backtest/latest

TWITTER BRAIN SCAN — Autonomous BD via Twitter (every 2h):

STEP 1 — GROK X_SEARCH:
Scan keywords via Grok x_search API (FREE): 'CEX listing', 'exchange listing', 'listing partnership', 'token launch Base', 'deploy token', 'new token project team', '$5M mcap DEX only', 'just launched Solana/Base/BSC'.

STEP 2 — SERPER CROSS-REFERENCE:
Cross-reference top keywords via Serper API (FREE) for Twitter/X search results.

STEP 3 — FILTER (L1-L10):
Must have contract address OR DexScreener/CoinGecko link. Must be 500+ followers. Must NOT be reply chain. Must NOT be already in pipeline. Must NOT be spam.

STEP 4 — CONTRACT EXTRACTION:
Extract contract addresses (Solana base58 / EVM 0x). Verify via DexScreener. Filter: liquidity > $10K, volume > $5K.

STEP 5 — PIPELINE ROUTING:
Route verified tokens to existing 5 sub-agent scoring pipeline.

STEP 6 — REPLY QUEUE:
Generate contextual BD outreach replies (max 12/day). Rate limit: 30s between replies.

STEP 7 — AUTONOMOUS REPLIES (if TWEET_AUTO=true):
Post replies via X API pay-per-use. Log every reply to JVR.

STEP 8 — SCAN SUMMARY TWEET:
Post scan summary tweet if tokens were routed.

Trigger manually: POST /api/v1/twitter/brain/scan
Check status: GET /api/v1/twitter/brain/status
